creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
This problem occurs due to a "permanent" reset of the once made
configurations in the port (this is not devel/subversion specific and
affects on our installation also other ports and is supposed to be a
problem of the ports framework).

Therefore, the PR can be closed. After recompiling on the client in
question with expressively setting configuration again (three times!)
correctly, the necessary functionality is provided again and the error
disappears.
